---
title: "Finanzas Públicas"
subtitle: "Deuda del Sector Público de Chile como % del PIB"
date: last-modified
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go

url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Economia-y-politicas-publicas/chiledatos/main/data/finanzas_publicas.csv"

df = pd.read_csv(url, sep=";", encoding="latin-1")

df.columns = [
    "periodo", "deuda_bruta_gc", "deuda_neta_gc",
    "deuda_bruta_bc", "deuda_neta_bc",
    "deuda_bruta_sp", "deuda_neta_sp",
    "deuda_bruta_ep", "deuda_neta_ep",
]

cols_numericas = [
    "deuda_bruta_gc", "deuda_neta_gc",
    "deuda_bruta_bc", "deuda_neta_bc",
    "deuda_bruta_sp", "deuda_neta_sp",
    "deuda_bruta_ep", "deuda_neta_ep",
]
df[cols_numericas] = df[cols_numericas].apply(pd.to_numeric, errors="coerce")

df["fecha"] = pd.to_datetime(df["periodo"], format="%b.%Y", errors="coerce")
df = df.dropna(subset=["fecha"]).sort_values("fecha")
```

## Deuda bruta del Gobierno Central

```{python}
fig = px.line(
    df, x="fecha", y="deuda_bruta_gc",
    labels={"fecha": "Período", "deuda_bruta_gc": "% del PIB"},
    template="plotly_white",
    color_discrete_sequence=["#2980b9"],
    markers=False,
)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Deuda bruta del Gobierno Central (% del PIB)",
    font_family="Inter",
    yaxis=dict(tickformat=".1f"),
)
fig.show()
```

## Deuda neta vs bruta — Sector Público Consolidado

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_bruta_sp"],
    name="Deuda bruta", line=dict(color="#e74c3c"),
    fill="tozeroy", fillcolor="rgba(231,76,60,0.1)",
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_neta_sp"],
    name="Deuda neta", line=dict(color="#2980b9"),
))
fig.add_hline(y=0, line_dash="dash", line_color="gray", opacity=0.5)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Deuda bruta y neta — Sector Público Consolidado (% del PIB)",
    yaxis_title="% del PIB",
    xaxis_title="Período",
    template="plotly_white",
    font_family="Inter",
    yaxis=dict(tickformat=".1f"),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=1.1),
)
fig.show()
```

## Comparación por componente

```{python}
fig = px.line(
    df,
    x="fecha",
    y=["deuda_bruta_gc", "deuda_bruta_bc", "deuda_bruta_ep"],
    labels={
        "fecha": "Período",
        "value": "% del PIB",
        "variable": "Componente",
    },
    color_discrete_map={
        "deuda_bruta_gc": "#2980b9",
        "deuda_bruta_bc": "#e74c3c",
        "deuda_bruta_ep": "#27ae60",
    },
    template="plotly_white",
)
fig.for_each_trace(lambda t: t.update(name={
    "deuda_bruta_gc": "Gobierno Central",
    "deuda_bruta_bc": "Banco Central",
    "deuda_bruta_ep": "Empresas Públicas",
}[t.name]))
fig.update_layout(
    title="Deuda bruta por componente (% del PIB)",
    font_family="Inter",
    yaxis=dict(tickformat=".1f"),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=1.1),
)
fig.show()
```
